review_summary: Transcript is sufficient for application questions about autoregressive rollout generation and RNN variants such as character-level or contextual generation. No separate clip is needed.

question_bank.question: After training a word-level RNN language model, how do you actually generate a sentence?
choices: Start with a start-of-sequence token, sample a word, feed it back in, and continue until an end-of-sequence token appears
Choose the single highest-frequency sentence from the corpus
Run teacher forcing on the training text and copy the outputs
Average all hidden states from the training set into one sentence
question_bank.explanation: Generation is autoregressive: begin from a start symbol and an initial hidden state, sample from the model’s next-word distribution, feed the sampled token back, and stop at an end symbol.

transcript_quotes: feeds that generated token back in
